transcript: Robot: ನಾನು ready. [I am ready.] Woman: I am ready. Robot: ನೀನು ಬರ್ತಿಯಾ? [Will you come?] Woman: Will you come? Robot: ನನಗೆ ಗೊತ್ತಿಲ್ಲ. [I don't know.] Woman: I don't know. Robot: ಇದು ಸುಲಭ. [This is easy.] Woman: This is easy. Robot: ನನಗೆ ಸಹಾಯ ಮಾಡು. [Help me.] Woman: Help me. Robot (AI avatar): MySivi app ನಲ್ಲಿ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಹೀಗೆ practice ಮಾಡಿ ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಾ easy ಆಗಿ English ಕಲಿಯಿರಿ. Daily 10 min ಸಾಕು... ನೀವು ಕೂಡ confident ಆಗಿ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀರಾ. Just ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿ trial ಇದೆ. Download ಮಾಡಿ, ಇಂದೇ start ಮಾಡಿ. [Practice with me like this on the MySivi app, speak in Kannada and learn English easily. Just 10 minutes daily is enough... you too will speak confidently. There is a trial for just one rupee. Download and start today.] Voiceover: Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: ನಾನು READY I AM [I am ready], ನೀನು ಬರ್ತಿಯಾ? WILL YOU COME? [Will you come?], ನನಗೆ ಗೊತ್ತಿಲ್ಲ I DON'T KNOW [I don't know], ಇದು ಸುಲಭ THIS IS EASY [This is easy], ನನಗೆ ಸಹಾಯ ಮಾಡು HELP ME [Help me], MySivi APPನಲ್ಲಿ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಹೀಗೆ PRACTICE ಮಾಡಿ ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಾ EASY ಆಗಿ English ಕಲಿಯಿರಿ [Practice with me like this on MySivi app, speak in Kannada and learn English easily], DAILY 10 MIN ಸಾಕು... ನೀವು ಕೂಡ CONFIDENT ಆಗಿ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀರಾ [Daily 10 min is enough... you too will speak confidently], JUST 1 ₹ TRIAL ಇದೆ [Just 1 rupee trial is there], DOWNLOAD ಮಾಡಿ, ಇಂದೇ START ಮಾಡಿ [Download and start today], MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: The ad showcases a translation practice session between a robot and a woman to demonstrate how the MySivi app works. An AI avatar explains that practicing for 10 minutes daily on the app helps users speak English confidently. It ends with a ₹1 trial offer and a call to install the app.
